chapter_title.en: The Prayer for Eclipses, Earthquakes, Winds, and Oppression and Their Causes

text: 1524 - وَقَالَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلرِّيَاحُ خَمْسَةٌ مِنْهَا اَلْعَقِيمُ فَنَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنْ شَرِّهَا.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1524 - Imam Ali (as) said:
"There are five types of wind, and among them is the barren wind (al-‘aqim), from whose harm we seek refuge in Allah (swt)."
